notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Konnor Griffin scores. Joey Bart scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielder's choice. Nick Gonzales to 3rd. Billy Cook to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn.
